'''Mart Ringatz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] who was wanted by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] for the theft of jewels belonging to [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] visiting [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

==Posted Bounty==
*'''Wanted Dead Or Alive:'''
*'''Alive:''' 3000 Credits
*'''Dead:''' 1500 Credits
*'''Species:''' Ishi Tib
*'''Sex:''' Male
*'''Known Affliates:''' None
*'''Last Known Location:''' Coruscant
*'''Brief:''' Subject wanted in connection with the theft of precious jewels belonging to Sullustan dignitaries visiting Dantooine.
*'''Originator:''' Republic Security Force

==Behind the scenes==
Mart Ringatz bounty was worth 3,000 credits alive and 1,500 credits dead.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
